name: Pepper Beef Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the basic meatballs recipe and set aside.
2. Melt the margarine in a large skillet. Add the onion and cook until tender.
3. Add the cooked meatballs, 1 1/2 cups water, bouillon, garlic salt, ginger, and soy sauce to the skillet. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir together 2 tablespoons cornstarch with 2 tablespoons water. Add this mixture to the sauce in the skillet.
6. Cook until thickened and boiling, about 3 minutes.
7. Add the tomato wedges and continue cooking, covered, until crisp tender, about 3 minutes longer.
